best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-user-004 title: user login with valid credentials module: user source pages: 2 preconditions: a user has been registered. test data: - email: example@example.com - password: strongpassword123 test steps: 1. enter the email and password in the login form. 2. click on the login button. 3. wait for the firebase authentication response. 4. check if the user is logged in successfully. expected result: the user should be logged in successfully, and the system should return the firebaseuser.

test case id: tc-ranking-001 title: user completes a ranking module: ranking source pages: 1 preconditions: a user is logged in and a ranking exists. test data: - user: example@example.com - ranking: id=1, titolo="first ranking", superato=false test steps: 1. log in as the user. 2. complete the ranking. 3. check if the ranking is marked as superato. expected result: the ranking should be marked as superato for the user.

test case id: tc-user-003 title: user registration with password less than 8 characters module: user source pages: 3 preconditions: test data: - email: example@example.com - password: pass123 test steps: 1. enter the email and a password with less than 8 characters in the registration form. 2. click on the registration button. 3. observe the error message. expected result: an error message should be displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long.

test case id: tc-user-003 title: user registration with password less than 8 characters module: user source pages: 3 preconditions: test data: - email: example@example.com - password: pass123 test steps: 1. enter the email and a password with less than 8 characters in the registration form. 2. click on the registration button. 3. observe the error message. expected result: an error message should be displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long.
